findings.summary: Cloudflare Pages deploy helper defaulted to branch=main, making production deploy the default remote mutation. The helper now defaults to the current git branch, blocks main unless OTTO_PAGES_ALLOW_PRODUCTION=1, and supports OTTO_PAGES_DRY_RUN=1.
Assistant output followed by idle timeout wrote a success receipt without emitting the normal terminal result event. The WS transport now emits result success on that fallback path.
Apex documentation claimed otto.haus was on an empty Worker. Read-only review saw otto-haus.pages.dev serve the site and otto.haus return DNS no-answer, so docs now state only the verified boundary.

assertions: attachment prompt timeout scales with attachment count
idle timeout without assistant keeps transport ready and emits a recoverable error
assistant response without idle emits terminal result success and keeps transport ready

pagesDeployHelper.previewDryRun: OTTO_PAGES_DRY_RUN=1 OTTO_PAGES_BRANCH=preview-test bash site/deploy-pages.sh printed wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=otto-haus --branch=preview-test --commit-dirty=true
pagesDeployHelper.productionGuard: OTTO_PAGES_BRANCH=main bash site/deploy-pages.sh refused production deploy
pagesDeployHelper.productionDryRunWithApproval: OTTO_PAGES_DRY_RUN=1 OTTO_PAGES_BRANCH=main OTTO_PAGES_ALLOW_PRODUCTION=1 bash site/deploy-pages.sh printed the production command without deploying

siteReadOnlyChecks.apex: curl and DNS lookup for otto.haus returned no DNS answer from this environment

securityScan.result: No remaining reportable security findings after Codex repairs.

verification.result: 300 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 1006 expect; verify:v0 5/5; docs validate and broken-links passed; electron build passed; bun audit found no vulnerabilities; git diff checks clean.

shipNotes: Ship the WS runtime timeout fix and safe Pages helper with the functional-labs train.
Do not ship this as an apex launch: otto.haus is not verified live on Pages and DNS/custom-domain movement remains a Sebastian-approved one-way door.
No production Pages deploy or DNS/dashboard mutation was performed by Codex review.
